text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Dia, you're really into that book, huh?
What's it about?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's called The Encyclopedia of World Superstitions. It's all about how the smallest things you do — or don't do — can bring about various jinxes.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hee hee. With so many jinxes, it's fun
to plan out how I'll overcome each and
every one of them!♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're always taking on new
challenges, huh? You must really love it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This one looks particularly intriguing. "If two
people attempt to meet up at a festival, one
will always get lost somehow".

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whooa! Festivals are my thing!
We should try it out next time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wait, we've been to lots of festivals together,
but aren't you always getting lost even
without the jinx?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You might be right… Hehe, and when I
think about it, there might not be any need
for us to overcome this one, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Because, Kita, even if we do get split up, you always manage to find me♪
